scenario.name: Full Call + VQ Report UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: sut <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 10000 RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: sut <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[last_To_tag] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: sut <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[last_To_tag] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE Content-Length: 0

PUBLISH sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: collector <sip:collector@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 PUBLISH Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Event: vq-rtcpxr Content-Type: application/vq-rtcpxr User-Agent: Yealink SIP-T46S 66.15.0.10 Content-Length: [len]
VQSessionReport: CallTerm CallID: [call_id]@[local_ip] LocalID: sip:user1@[local_ip] RemoteID: sip:user2@[remote_ip] NLR=1.20 JDR=2.50 BLD=0.80 GLD=0.15 RTD=85.3 ESD=42.7 IAJ=8.1 MAJ=4.2 MOSLQ=3.8 MOSCQ=3.5 RLQ=78.0 RCQ=72.0 RERL=45.0
